changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;

changeSet.author: codex
codex
codex
codex
codex
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE model_catalog ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, code VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE, display_name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, provider VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, model_type VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(1000), enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE, public_selectable BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, default_for_public BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );
CREATE INDEX idx_model_catalog_type_enabled ON model_catalog(model_type, enabled);

changeSet.author: codex
codex
codex
codex
codex
codex
codex
changeSet.sql: UPDATE knowledge_document SET status = 'READY' WHERE status = 'PROCESSING' AND source_filename IN ( 'knowledge-box-project-definition.md', 'knowledge-box-agent-definition.md' );

changeSet.author: codex
codex
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO user_account (email, password_hash, password_login_enabled, enabled, last_login_at) SELECT 'admin@example.com', '{bcrypt}$2y$10$C07jFOscKcjb5GSLlLCIqeovZRE3DV0FdQcf4VnD8PJy2cwDBLqdm', TRUE, TRUE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_account WHERE lower(email) = 'admin@example.com' );
